creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 213907
add new port rundeck3

This is a new port, sysutils/rundeck3. as suggested in bug 245703, rundeck2 should not be updated to rundeck3 but separated in to 2 different ports. This is the new port, rundeck3.
The bug for renaming rundeck to rundeck3 is: bug 231351
